texto: All beings so far have created something beyond themselves
autor: and do you want to be the ebb of this great flood and even go back to the beasts rather than overcome man? What is the ape to man? A laughingstock or a painful embarrassment. And man shall be just that for the overman: a laughingstock or a painful embarrassment…
explicacao: Citação de and do you want to be the ebb of this great flood and even go back to the beasts rather than overcome man? What is the ape to man? A laughingstock or a painful embarrassment. And man shall be just that for the overman: a laughingstock or a painful embarrassment… sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “All beings so far have created something beyond themselves” articula reflexao, friedrich-nietzsche, thus-spoke-zarathustra em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como thus-spoke-zarathustra.
